description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in business attire, featuring a collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves, a necktie, and fitted trousers. He wears a pair of formal shoes and has a belt visible at the waist. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and is depicted wearing glasses. His arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, with hands open and fingers naturally spaced. The overall build is average, and the facial features are clean-shaven and well-defined, giving a professional and approachable appearance.
description: A professionally dressed adult male with glasses, collared shirt, tie, and formal shoes, standing upright with arms slightly extended.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, necktie, glasses, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and trousers, and the formal shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, belt, and trousers, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hairstyle, and the relaxed posture of the arms and hands.
attribute_clothing_type: business shirt with necktie and formal trousers
